subject: Re:
body:
1030 monday would be good


----- Original Message ----
From: Sean J. Lancaster <bristolgv@earthlink.net>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; lvjet@aol.com
Sent: Thursday, November 16, 2006 4:31:53 PM
Subject: 


 
Mr. Epstein and Larry V. 
 
UPDATE
 
 
The GV s 506 arrives tomorrow night into Teteboro at midnight.  It can be seen and photographed on Saturday, Sunday, or Monday in Teteboro.  It has a tentative schedule for a trip on Wednesday and could go out as early as Monday. 
 
The contact person is Dan Jennings at 310-980-9069 and he seems very helpful.  I will coordinate things but just in case I wanted you both to have the information. They claim to have a showing on Sunday at 200pm to another party.  I really do not believe it as he said several things in the conversation that seemed a bit exaggerated in terms of calls and interest in the aircraft.  The owner recently bought a BBJ and that is the reason for the GV sale.
 
 
 
Best regards,
 
 
Sean J. Lancaster 
Bristol Associates Inc. 
1-540-665-5135 
1-540-533-8183 Mobile
1-202-682-4000 main office
1-540-665-5136 fax
1-540-877-3525 Home
bristolgv@earthlink.net

1030 monday would be good

----- Original Message ----
From: Sean J. Lancaster <bristolgv@earthlink.net>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; lvjet@aol.com
Sent: Thursday, November 16, 2006 4:31:53 PM
Subject:

 

Mr. Epstein and Larry V.

 

UPDATE

 

 

The GV s 506 arrives tomorrow night into Teteboro at midnight.  It can be seen and photographed on Saturday, Sunday, or Monday in Teteboro.  It has a tentative schedule for a trip on Wednesday and could go out as early as Monday.

 

The contact person is Dan Jennings at 310-980-9069 and he seems very helpful.  I will coordinate things but just in case I wanted you both to have the information. They claim to have a showing on Sunday at 200pm to another party.  I really do not believe it as he said several things in the conversation that seemed a bit exaggerated in terms of calls and interest in the aircraft.  The owner recently bought a BBJ and that is the reason for the GV sale.

 

 

 

Best regards,

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster
